meaning: n.<澳>金合欢属植物[土著语]
examples: The Turkish captain and his men took us to Sallee in Morocco.
Was surprised in the grey of the morning, by a Turkish rover of Sallee, who gave Chase to us with all the sail she could make.
The same Day of the Year that I escaped out of the Wreck of that Ship in Yarmouth Rodes, that same Day-Year afterwards I made my escape from Sallee in the Boat.
